appraisal_events.evidence: Il toucha légèrement son chapeau et dit au journaliste: « Monsieur, est-ce que vous voudriez bien jeter votre cigare, la fumée fait mal à mon ami. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents him as considerate and socially adept, politely but effectively intervening to protect his friend from the cigar smoke.

status_effects.explanation: His local standing improves through courteous protection of the narrator, framed as tactful and attentive.
